overview: Vidyamandir is a bilingual (English & Bengali) e-commerce bookshop for a local shop in Purba Bardhaman, West Bengal. It features a full Flipkart/Amazon-style shopping experience with flash sales, address book, reviews, Stripe checkout, wishlist, and an admin dashboard — all styled with a premium dark navy and orange editorial aesthetic.
features: Bilingual catalog (English & Bengali) with language toggle
Flash sales with live countdown timers
Cart, Buy Now, and Wishlist synced to account
Address book with up to 5 saved addresses
Star ratings and reviews on every product
Admin dashboard for products, flash sales, and orders
Beautiful dark navy and orange editorial design
